entities.description: m31 resetn pu 1v8 is a cpu reset input pin used for controlling peripheral interface resets
pmic rk806 1  is a power management ic that provides a reset output resetb pin connected to the cpu reset input
vdd 3v3 som output is a power supply line that introduces a delay before the reset signal is pulled high

relations.description: the cpu reset input pin is connected to the pmic s reset output pin  allowing for coordinated reset control
the reset signal is delayed by vdd 3v3 som output for approximately 5 2ms before being pulled high
